parameters.query: SELECT s.id AS schedule_id, s.platform, s.caption_override, s.scheduled_at, c.caption_main, c.asset_ids, c.content_type, (SELECT a.url FROM cmp_assets a WHERE a.id = (c.asset_ids[1]) LIMIT 1) AS asset_url, (SELECT a.asset_type FROM cmp_assets a WHERE a.id = (c.asset_ids[1]) LIMIT 1) AS asset_type FROM cmp_schedules s JOIN cmp_content_items c ON c.id = s.content_item_id WHERE s.status = 'pending' AND s.post_mode = 'auto' AND s.platform IN ('fb', 'ig') AND s.scheduled_at BETWEEN now() - interval '5 minutes' AND now() + interval '5 minutes'
UPDATE cmp_schedules SET status = 'incomplete', updated_at = now() WHERE id = $1
UPDATE cmp_schedules SET status = 'auto_posted', platform_post_id = $1, posted_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE id = $2
UPDATE cmp_schedules SET status = 'failed', notes = $1, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $2
